todaySummary:
# Daily Executive Brief – Andy

## Executive Summary
- Focus on strengthening US GTM execution and improving efficiency.
- Prepare thoroughly for Strategy Days in Stuttgart on May 26-27 with executive leadership.
- Build AKEOS operational foundation while increasing strategic external visibility.

## Top Priorities
- Achieve GTM forecast target of 7.5 Million Euros.
- Drive AI augmentation within GTM team led by RevOps (Pedro).
- Develop stronger strategic communication and CEO/founder readiness.

## Risks
- Risk of overcommitment across multiple initiatives.
- Potential loss of clarity due to operational overload and managing dual households.

## Opportunities
- Leverage AI-driven executive augmentation for competitive advantage.
- Enhance industry visibility and build long-term board positioning.

## Strategic Meetings
- No strategic meetings scheduled for today.

## People / Follow-ups
- Collaborate closely with Patrick Glasser (CEO), Achim Hoth (CSO), Oli Kunath (CFO), and Dominik Kenzler (CPTO) on Strategy Days preparation.

## Strategic Reminder
Balance operational execution with long-term founder readiness to sustain growth and avoid overload.
